name: Philosykos
comment: Preferred for longevity; core fresh fig signature.
main_accords: green, woody, sweet, fresh, fruity

name: Philosykos
comment: Luminous green fig, signature, emotional; EdP matches but EdT is brighter.
main_accords: green, woody, fresh, sweet, fruity

name: Terre d'Hermès Eau de Parfum Intense
comment: Spicy, woody-mineral, embracing, excellent sillage; signature comfort and warmth.
main_accords: coffee, fresh spicy, warm spicy, woody, soft spicy

name: Irish Leather
comment: Dynamic green-citrus leather, lightly powdery; elegant, empowering for professional use.
main_accords: aromatic, fresh spicy, leather, woody, animalic

name: Hacivat
comment: Bright, energetic, musky Aventus-like scent; sharper, masculine, excellent projection. Fruity opening, elegant drydown—dynamic core for spring/summer.
main_accords: woody, citrus, mossy, fruity, earthy

name: Desert Dawn
comment: Crisp cardamom-citrus, lively rose; dries to aromatic spicy woods, mood-lifter, short-lived.

name: Aventus
comment: Citrusy, elegant, creamy woody heart; formal, "old noble" vibe. Best for refined spring/summer occasions, potential future core.
top_notes: Bergamot, Black Currant, Apple, Lemon, Pink Pepper
base_notes: Birch, Musk, Oak Moss, Ambroxan, Cedarwood
main_accords: fruity, sweet, leather, woody, smoky

name: Un Jardin sur le Nil
comment: Elegant green citrus, watery/floral undertones; distinctly summer and uplifting, refined and neutral character. Excellent freshness, projection, longevity—slightly feminine, suits social/office/casual wear.
main_accords: citrus, aromatic, floral, fresh spicy, green

name: Chergui
comment: Cozy tobacco, honey, hay; warm, autumnal, excellent drydown.

main_accords: amber, sweet, tobacco, honey, powdery

name: Colonia Il Profumo
comment: Polished citrus-aromatic with rich fougère-powdery heart. Sophisticated and autumnal; fades to skin scent quickly but decent longevity. Safe elegant option for office/formal wear.

main_accords: citrus, woody, aromatic, fresh spicy, sweet

name: Oud
comment: Refined Italian oud with fresh opening and distinct saffron/animalic wood drydown. Sharp saffron note defines identity; elegant and mysterious for evening wear.
main_accords: woody, citrus, oud, leather, aromatic

name: Petit Matin
comment: Joyful citrus-green, soft lavender; more "space" scent than personal signature.

main_accords: citrus, musky, white floral, aromatic, lavender

name: Jazz Club

name: Endymion Concentrée
comment: Elegant, gentle, powdery musk; discreet/formal, versatile, engaging.
main_accords: leather, fresh spicy, aromatic, lavender, herbal

comment: Contemplative sandalwood with woody-spicy character; spiciness builds over time causing uneasiness/discomfort.

comment: Airy aromatic sandalwood; subtle floral/incense, calming, comforting wafts.

name: Alexandria II
comment: Magnificently luxurious oriental perfume, perfect for a date night.
